{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Monarch platform
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Court]]'s [[Monarch platform]] is a jeweled palace on a rainbow-colored cloud.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sha Miara]]'s [[Monarch platform]] is decorated with stained glass, furniture, ornamental spirits, and multi-colored light.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
